description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) Passage from Leviticus 1:3-5, probably from a children’s Hebrew textbook. Arabic jottings on recto top right and other jottings on verso top left margin, both in different colours. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: קטע מויקרא א:3-5, כנראה מספר לימוד עברי לילדים; רישומים ערביים בפינה העליונה ימין
